docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-25-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WENTWORTH, LEILONI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYNES, JASON $800.00 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $865.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL ON JUN-09-2011 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JUN-09-2011 BY RONALD E. QUIDACHAY.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT WENTWORTH, LEILONI RECOVER FROM APPELLANT HAYNES, JASON $1,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,260.00, THE COURT FINDS APPELLANT ACTED IN BAD FAITH & WAS MATERIOUSLY INCREDIBLE. APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT HAYNES, JASON ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-10-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
APPELLANT/DEFENDANT JASON HAYNES IS PRESENT IN COURT. RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF LELIONE WENTWORTH IS ALSO PRESENT.

THE CAUSE COMES ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. ALL PARTIES AND WITNESSES ARE SWORN.

JASON HAYNES TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF APPELLANT/DEFENDANT. THE FOLLOWING DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE IS INTRODUCED:
1- ACCOUNTING FORM, HANDWRITTEN
2- RENTAL AGREEMENT

LELIONE WENTWORTH TESTIFIES ON BEHALF OF RESPONDENT/PLAINTIFF.

AT THE CONCLUSION OF THE HEARING, THE MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. EXHIBITS PRESENTED AT TODAY'S HEARING ARE RETURNED TO SUBMITTING PARTY.

JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED (501).

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Continued To Jun-09-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 501

Off Calendar Jun-08-2011 Set For Trial On Jun-08-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
